dialogos.texto_en: Look, Futaro!\nA big manta ray is coming this way!
Ohhh...\nThat school of fish is so neatly avoiding it.
It's amazing how they don't collide.\nIs there someone in charge of traffic control\nin the school of fish?
Teehee, perhaps.
Or, maybe the manta is warning them that it's dangerous.
Maybe there is a language for fishes\nthat we humans can't understand.
Yes.
(Alright! we're speaking without feeling awkward anymore!\n Coming to the aquarium was the right decision\n for us to rekindle our love!)
(If I keep this up,\n maybe I can find out why Miku was avoiding me...)
Futaro? What's wrong?
No, it's nothing.\nShall we go see some other tanks?
Mm...
I'm fine here.\nI want to talk more with you, Futaro.
Is that so.\n...I was thinking the same thing.
We're on the same page.
(After that, Miku and I\n continued chatting in front of the big tank.)
(We talked about her sisters, and the tourist spots\n we visited yesterday. Just trivial things,\n but it was fun and pleasant.)
I see, you were looking forward to the dolphin show.
Yeah. I found out about it\nwhile doing research for our trip.
I've been wanting to go to Ocean Expo Park.\nAnd see it together with you, Futaro...
Okay, then let's go after this.
Right. Thanks, Futaro.
What's wrong?
Looks like Yotsuba and the others are back.
Huh? No, I can't see them anywhere?
I know they're hiding right here.
Ah, we've been found.
They found us.
That's why I told you guys we shouldn't be sneaky and hiding.
You guys...\nHow long have you been there?
We just came back, you know?\nBut both of you looked like you were having fun,\nso I thought maybe we were intruding.
Come on...
Ah, everyone's already gathered here.
Welcome back!\nWhat did you and Nino go look at?
We went to see tropical fish.\nAfter that, we took a break\nand sat down to watch them in a tank.
How about you two,\nMiku and Fu-kun?\nHave you guys been here the whole time?
Well, yeah.\nWe got carried away talking.
But it was fun.
Wow, you guys talked that much, huh.
Well, as long as you two had fun, right?
Yes.
It looks like your plan was a success, Uesugi-san.
Yeah, that's thanks to the advice you gave me.
Ehehe, glad I could help.
